subject: feat(debug): mount DebugPill in separate ReactDOM root on web
body:
Previously the pill lived inside the Expo app tree, so any crash that
unmounted the root layout took it with it — including the very case
where it's most useful. Mount it into <div id="debug-root"> via its
own createRoot(); a fully independent reconciler is unaffected by
crashes in the main tree. Native keeps the inline render since the
separate-DOM-root concept doesn't apply on iOS/Android.

Reused the existing DebugPill component (react-native-web renders RN
components into any DOM node once the style registry is initialised)
rather than duplicating ~450 lines as a DOM-native variant.

Tags: debug, web, pwa, resilience
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
